allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match "streamlit|python" } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path)
PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=42868 or ProcessId=12052 or ProcessId=30236 or ProcessId=30320")
Bash(timeout 15 python -m streamlit run app.py --server.headless true --server.port 8534)
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); ast.parse\(open\('sdof_model.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\)")
